name: general-intelligence-systems
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for General Intelligence Systems.

plugins.name: bpm
plugins.description: BPM tooling for Claude Code: author bpmn-io form-js form schemas (create/edit forms, validation) that form-js-viewer can render.

plugins.name: ruby-development
plugins.description: General Ruby development tooling for Claude Code: skills for idiomatic modern Ruby, starting with HTTP clients via the http.rb gem (chainable API, response pattern matching, persistent connections).

plugins.name: ruby-gtk
plugins.description: Ruby GTK4/Libadwaita tooling for Claude Code: build, review, and plan Ruby GTK4 desktop apps using the declarative memoized-widget pattern.

plugins.name: rubycam
plugins.description: Webcam control for Claude Code via the rubycam CLI: drive any UVC camera (pan/tilt/zoom, image controls, snapshots) plus OBSBOT Tiny 2 vendor features (wake/sleep, AI tracking, presets, HDR, exposure).

plugins.name: cnstudio
plugins.description: CnStudio design tools for Claude Code: MCP server connection, design-model skill, and slash commands.
